private_opportunities.title: DTW Interactive Digital Signage featured in Airport Improvement ...
private_opportunities.snippet:
As General Contractor and Prime Consultant, Arora’s responsibility on the project includes design, construction, operational support, and ongoing maintenance through the firm’s facilities maintenance subsidiary, Arora Systems Group. DTW will replace paper directories in the North Terminal and introduce interactive kiosks in both the North and McNamara Terminals in subsequent phases of the project.

The full article can be read in the March/April edition of Airport Improvement Magazine.

private_opportunities.title: Philadelphia International Airport: Digital Signage Ecosystem Refresh
private_opportunities.snippet:
# Philadelphia International Airport

#### Project Digital Signage Ecosystem Refresh

Airport/Facilities Planning & Design, Technology Implementation, Technology Planning

In preparation for the World Cup and the United States' 250th birthday in 2026, Philadelphia International Airport (PHL), supported by The JW Group, embarked on a multi-year journey to modernize their digital signage ecosystem.

JWG is supporting this effort through their active On-Call contract.

### Project Description

#### FIDS Assessment and Recommendations

private_opportunities.title: Benefits of Self-Pay Kiosks for Public Transportation System - Wavetec
private_opportunities.snippet:
Along with airports, self-service kiosks are also used in train stations to make ticketing easier and more efficient.

For example, the Shinkansen high-speed rail network in Japan relies on these kiosks for smooth and quick ticket purchases. Passengers can buy tickets and enter the platform with little to no waiting.

In short, self-pay kiosks, whether in airports or train stations, help reduce long lines, speed up operations, and make travel more seamless and stress-free.

### 3. Smart Cities

In smart cities, self-pay kiosks provide easy access to public services, not just transportation. In Bristol, UK, contactless payment kiosks allow residents to effortlessly make charitable donations, incorporating social responsibility into daily urban life. [...] ### 2. Airports and Train Stations

Self-pay kiosks are changing how people check-in for flights and buy train tickets, making the process faster and more convenient.

For example, Emirates Airlines has introduced Wavetec’s self-service kiosks at Dubai International Airport to help passengers check in and drop off their bags more quickly.

These kiosks allow travelers to complete tasks like printing boarding passes, selecting seats, and checking in luggage without assistance from airline staff.

Kiosks in airports further use touchless technology, allowing passengers to control everything with their mobile devices. This makes the process safer and more convenient. By reducing wait times, especially during busy hours, they improve the overall travel experience. [...] As transit systems modernize, self-pay kiosks for public transport improvements have become essential rather than optional. They make services more reliable, improve accessibility, and support the shift toward cashless and contactless payments.

To stay competitive and meet passenger expectations, transit authorities should invest in this technology. Self-service kiosks create a smoother travel experience and streamline operations. Now is the time to modernize public transportation with self-pay kiosks.

BOOK A FREE DEMO

executive_takeaway: The biggest opportunity this week lies in the private sector, particularly with the digital signage projects at Detroit Metropolitan Airport and Philadelphia International Airport. Leadership should prioritize immediate engagement with Arora Systems Group and The JW Group to explore collaboration opportunities. Additionally, pre-tender signals at Bishop and Cherry Capital Airports suggest potential for future bids; thus, preparing detailed product briefs and registering with relevant authorities is crucial for positioning PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS for success in these upcoming projects.
final_brief:
Business Opportunities Snapshot — Airport and Transport (Last 7 Days)

── LIVE EU TENDERS ──────────────────────────────────
No live EU tenders in this sector this period.

── PRIVATE OPPORTUNITIES ────────────────────────────
• DTW Interactive Digital Signage featured in Airport Improvement | Arora Systems Group | Published: 
  Fit: Arora Systems Group is expanding its digital infrastructure at Detroit Metropolitan Airport (DTW) by replacing paper directories with interactive kiosks. PARTTEAM could supply multimedia kiosks and digital signage solutions for this project.
  Action: Contact Arora Systems Group to discuss potential collaboration on the DTW project.
  Link: https://www.aroraengineers.com/3-16-dtw-interactive-digital-signage-featured-airport-improvement-magazine/

• Philadelphia International Airport: Digital Signage Ecosystem Refresh | The JW Group | Published: 
  Fit: Philadelphia International Airport is modernizing its digital signage ecosystem in preparation for major upcoming events. PARTTEAM could provide digital billboards, passenger information displays, and interactive kiosks to enhance the airport's digital infrastructure.
  Action: Contact Philadelphia International Airport's procurement team through The JW Group.
  Link: https://www.thejwg.com/index.php/projects/project-detail/digital-signage-refresh

• Benefits of Self-Pay Kiosks for Public Transportation System - Wavetec | Wavetec | Published: 
  Fit: Wavetec is highlighting the benefits of self-pay kiosks in public transportation systems, such as those used in Japan's Shinkansen network. PARTTEAM could offer their TRANSACT TVM ticket vending machines and passenger information displays to enhance ticketing and information services in similar transport networks.
  Action: Contact Wavetec to explore partnership opportunities for transport kiosk deployments.
  Link: https://www.wavetec.com/blog/benefits-of-self-pay-kiosks-for-public-transportation-systems/

── PRE-TENDER SIGNALS ───────────────────────────────
• [PDF] REQUEST FOR PROPOSAL 2025-RFP-0045 DIGITAL SIGNAGE | Published: 
  Signal: The public authority is planning to procure a Digital Signage Kiosk System for an airport and transport sector project.
  Action: Register with the authority and prepare a detailed product brief highlighting relevant transport and mobility deployments.
  Link: https://media.governmentnavigator.com/media/bid/1750959266_Digital_Signage_Kiosk_System.pdf

• [PDF] TERMINAL EXPANSION PROJECT AT THE BISHOP AIRPORT | Published: 
  Signal: The Bishop Airport terminal expansion project presents an opportunity for PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS to supply passenger information displays and digital signage solutions.
  Action: Register with the airport authority and prepare a detailed product brief highlighting relevant transport and mobility solutions.
  Link: https://www.inyocounty.us/sites/default/files/2021-07/Bishop%20Airport%20Terminal%20Project%20-%20Bid%20Package.pdf

• [PDF] Notice to Prospective Respondents - Cherry Capital Airport | Published: 
  Signal: The Cherry Capital Airport is planning a terminal expansion, which includes a detailed scope of services for design work.
  Action: Register with the Northwest Regional Airport Authority and prepare a product brief for passenger information displays and digital signage solutions.
  Link: https://tvcairport.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/TVC-Owners-Rep-RFP_Addendum-2_2025-01-06.pdf

── EXECUTIVE TAKEAWAY ───────────────────────────────
The biggest opportunity this week lies in the private sector, particularly with the digital signage projects at Detroit Metropolitan Airport and Philadelphia International Airport. Leadership should prioritize immediate engagement with Arora Systems Group and The JW Group to explore collaboration opportunities. Additionally, pre-tender signals at Bishop and Cherry Capital Airports suggest potential for future bids; thus, preparing detailed product briefs and registering with relevant authorities is crucial for positioning PARTTEAM & OEMKIOSKS for success in these upcoming projects.
